briefdescription.para: Set symmetric padding (same for pre and post)

parameterdescription.para: Padding values for each spatial dimension

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

parameterdescription.para: Padding before the input (per spatial dimension)

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

parameterdescription.para: Stride values for each spatial dimension

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining

parameterdescription.para: Dilation values for each spatial dimension

simplesect.para: Reference to this for method chaining
Reference to this for method chaining

detaileddescription.para: ConvFpropAttributes specifies the parameters for a forward convolution (fprop) operation: y = conv(x, w). The operation computes the convolution of input tensor x with filter tensor w.
